body:
**Yes, Valiant Garage Door installs Wi-Fi-enabled and smart garage door openers.** Based in the Pleasanton and East Bay area, they offer a lineup of LiftMaster smart openers equipped with built-in Wi-Fi and smartphone connectivity via the myQ app. Their tier options include: [LiftMaster Garage Door Openers | Valiant](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-openers#:~:text=and%20backup%20protection.-,LiftMaster%20Product%20Description,Mount%20opener%20with%20battery%20backup.)

  * **Smart Belt-Drive Openers:** Models like the LiftMaster 6580L-7 and 6690L-7, which feature ultra-quiet performance, battery backups, and integrated video cameras. [LiftMaster Garage Door Openers | Valiant](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-openers#:~:text=The%20LiftMaster%206690L%2D7%20is,for%20daily%2Duse%20residential%20garages.)

  * **Smart Chain-Drive Openers:** Heavy-duty options like the LiftMaster 2420L-7 and 4690L-7, offering durable lifting power alongside smart monitoring features. [LiftMaster Garage Door Openers | Valiant](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-openers)

  * **Wall-Mount Wi-Fi Openers:** Space-saving models like the LiftMaster 98022 and 98032 that mount directly beside the door to free up ceiling space. [LiftMaster Garage Door Openers | Valiant](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-openers#:~:text=and%20backup%20protection.-,LiftMaster%20Product%20Description,Mount%20opener%20with%20battery%20backup.)

Their installations typically range from about $449 to $899 depending on the model, lifting power, and features you select.

By the way, to unlock the full functionality of all Apps, enable [Gemini Apps Activity](https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini).
